title: "What Should I Desire To Learn?" Psalm 27:11

notes.introduction: A Bible study on Psalm 27:11 examining what specific things a believer should ask God to teach them, part of an ongoing series on the psalmist's plea 'teach me.' Recorded requests from Psalms, Judges, and Luke are surveyed, followed by practical recommendations drawn from Scripture.

sections.heading: Series Review: Purpose and Spirit of Learning
Recorded Requests: Teach Me Thy Way
Recorded Requests: Statutes, Judgment, and Numbering Days
Recommendation: Knowing God's Plan and One's Place In It
Recommendation: Learning How to Please God
Closing: God's Classrooms and Developing vs. Delivering
